title: ICAI CA Application Correction Window for Sep/Nov 2026 Exams Now Open!
content:
# ICAI CA Application Correction Window for Sep/Nov 2026 Exams Now Open!

Ek important update hai for all CA Foundation, Intermediate, and Final aspirants appearing for the September/November 2026 examinations. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne exam application correction window ko open kar diya hai.

Agar aapne apna examination form pehle hi submit kar diya hai aur usmein kuch details modify karna chahte hain, toh yeh aapke liye mauka hai.

*   **Correction Window Opens:** July 23, 2026 (Today!)
*   **Correction Window Closes:** July 25, 2026 (11:59 PM IST)
*   **What can be corrected:** Candidates can make permitted changes to details like their exam city, medium of examination, and other specific particulars through the online portal.
*   **Where to correct:** The corrections can be made on the ICAI e-services portal.

Toh, jaldi se check kar lo agar koi changes required hain aur deadline se pehle update kar do!

## Read the Official Document
*   [Visit the Official ICAI Website for Announcements](https://www.icai.org/)

*Published on: 23 July 2026*
